# Golden Fixtures (W-3.0)

These fixtures are generated by the reference collector and serve as
parity gates for future sidecar implementation.

**GRACE Wave:** W-3.0 (PHASE-3-SIDECAR)  
**Module:** M-SOLARSAGE-REFERENCE-COLLECTOR

## Purpose

The reference collector (`collect_solarsage_western_deep.py`) is declared **reference-only** and not used in product runtime. These golden fixtures establish the parity baseline for future sidecar/split work.

## Fixtures

### `vasiliy_2026-05-30.json`

Controller-approved chart (Vasiliy).

- **Birth:** 1980-10-30 19:50 Europe/Moscow
- **Location:** Murmansk (67.9387°N, 32.9241°E)
- **Target:** 2026-05-30 (age 45)
- **House System:** WHOLE_SIGN (auto-selected due to high latitude ≥60°)
- **Raw Layers:** 30 layers (all successful)
- **Special Points:** All present (ASC, MC, DSC, IC, VERTEX, ANTI_VERTEX, EAST_POINT, SELENA)

### `test_user_2026-06-15.json`

Additional test case for normal latitude.

- **Birth:** 1990-01-15 14:30 Europe/Moscow
- **Location:** Moscow (55.7558°N, 37.6173°E)
- **Target:** 2026-06-15 (age 36)
- **House System:** PLACIDUS (auto-selected due to normal latitude <60°)
- **Raw Layers:** 30 layers (all successful)
- **Special Points:** All present

## Regeneration

⚠️ **Only regenerate if reproducibility defects are found.**

The collector implementation is frozen (W-3.0 freeze-scope) except for fixing reproducibility defects discovered during fixture generation.

```bash
cd /opt/solarsage-astro/apps/solarsage

# Regenerate Vasiliy fixture
python3 collect_solarsage_western_deep.py \
  --name "Vasiliy" \
  --date 1980-10-30 \
  --time 19:50 \
  --timezone Europe/Moscow \
  --location "Murmansk" \
  --lat 67.9387 \
  --lon 32.9241 \
  --target-date 2026-05-30 \
  --out tests/fixtures/vasiliy_2026-05-30.json

# Regenerate TestUser fixture
python3 collect_solarsage_western_deep.py \
  --name "TestUser" \
  --date 1990-01-15 \
  --time 14:30 \
  --timezone Europe/Moscow \
  --location "Moscow" \
  --lat 55.7558 \
  --lon 37.6173 \
  --target-date 2026-06-15 \
  --out tests/fixtures/test_user_2026-06-15.json
```

## Parity Tests

Run parity tests to verify fixture structure and reproducibility:

```bash
cd /opt/solarsage-astro
pytest apps/solarsage/tests/test_parity.py -v
```

## Parity Tolerances

Future sidecar implementation (W-3.1 → W-3.4) must match these fixtures within declared tolerances:

- **Planets longitudes:** ±1e-6 deg
- **Houses cusps:** ±1e-6 deg
- **Aspects orbs:** ±1e-4 deg
- **Timestamp fields:** Excluded from comparison

## Coverage

Each fixture includes:

- **Raw layers (30):** natal, natal_whole_sign, natal_placidus, chart_wheel, dignity, bonification, dispositors (modern/traditional), profection, lots, bounds, antiscia, planetary_hours, heliacal, fixed_stars, midpoints, aspect_patterns, transit, progressions, solar_arc, primary_directions, symbolic_directions, solar_return, lunar_return, lunar_phase (birth/target/year), eclipses, firdaria, natal_report
- **Derived layers:** element_balance, modality_balance, house_emphasis, hemisphere_balance, quadrant_balance, angular_planets, dispositor_chains, major_aspects_ranked, all_aspects_ranked, special_points, special_point_major_aspects, sphere_scores, lots, aspect_patterns, antiscia, dignities, mutual_receptions, sect, bonification, faces, planetary_hours, heliacal_events, fixed_star_conjunctions, midpoints, dispositors

## Verification Matrix

See `grace/verification-matrix.md` for the full parity gate specification.

**Scenario S1:** Vasiliy golden chart and target date regenerate byte-stable normalized JSON except timestamp fields.

**Scenario S2:** A high-latitude chart (Vasiliy) uses the documented house-system fallback (WHOLE_SIGN at ≥60°).

**Scenario S3:** Chiron/Nodes/Lilith/Vertex fixed-star and aspect coverage remains present after service split.
